summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Chat History sidebar feature. All 13 features tested and working correctly. The Chat view uses MockGatewayAdapter (MOCKED - no real backend). All session data is in-memory mock data.
passed_tests: Chat History sidebar renders with 260px width
Dot indicators: filled orange dot for current session, outline dot for past sessions
Sending a message in current session works (optimistic render + mock Kit response)
/new command creates a new session, old session moves to history with outline dot
Clicking a past session loads its messages in read-only mode (no input box visible)
'Back to current' banner shows when viewing past session
'Back to current' button switches back to current session and restores input box
⋯ menu appears on hover with Rename and Delete options
Rename: clicking Rename shows inline edit, typing new name and pressing Enter updates title
Delete: clicking Delete removes session from list
Search: typing in search input filters sessions by title
'No matching chats' message shown when search has no results
Session title auto-generates from first user message (truncated to ~40 chars with ...)
Status bar shows model (claude-opus-4-6), context % (42%), token counts (12.4k in / 2.1k out), cost ($0.23)
critical_code_review_comments: MockGatewayAdapter properly simulates all chat interactions with realistic delays (800-1400ms)
Session state management correctly handles current vs viewing session distinction
Read-only mode properly hides input when viewing past sessions
Dot indicators correctly differentiate current (filled) vs past (outline) sessions
Search filtering works case-insensitively on session titles
Rename inline edit properly handles Enter/Escape/blur events
Delete properly handles edge cases (deleting current session, deleting viewed session)
seed_data_creation: MockGatewayAdapter starts with one session titled 'Current chat'. Test sessions created during testing are in-memory only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat History sidebar feature fully implemented and tested. Uses MockGatewayAdapter in gateway.js - all chat interactions are MOCKED with simulated responses. Key data-testids: chat-history-sidebar, new-chat-btn, chat-search-input, session-{id}, session-menu-{id}, rename-input-{id}, delete-session-{id}, back-to-current-banner, back-to-current-btn, chat-input, chat-send-btn, chat-status-bar. CSS classes: .mc-chat-history (260px sidebar), .mc-chat-history__dot--filled (current session), .mc-chat-back-banner (read-only mode banner).

mocked_methods: sendMessage - simulates Kit responses with 800-1400ms delay
createSession - creates new session in memory
renameSession - updates session title in memory
getHistory - returns session messages from memory
getStatus - returns mock status (model, context_pct, tokens, cost)
